languages.text: "Протокол 12.45-2!" {n}— гремит Альва, и ржаволовчие неуловимо меняют позицию.{/n} "Времени на общение с мирянами у нас не много, но я объясню".
"Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."
languages.original_text: "Протокол 12.45-2!" {n}— гремит Альва, и ржаволовчие неуловимо меняют позицию.{/n} "Времени на общение с мирянами у нас не много, но я объясню".

traits.locale_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n} rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."
"Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n} rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."
"Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n} rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

languages.text: 「プロトコル12.45ダッシュ2！」アルバが告げると、ラスストーカーたちは微妙に位置を変えた。「一般の人たちとコミュニケーションを取る時間はほとんどないが、説明するよ」
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n} rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコル12.45ダッシュ2！」アルバが告げると、ラスストーカーたちは微妙に位置を変えた。「一般の人たちとコミュニケーションを取る時間はほとんどないが、説明するよ。」

languages.text: «¡Protocolo 12.45 guion 2!», {n} exclama Alva. Los ferracechadores cambian sutilmente de posición.{/n} «No hay mucho tiempo para comunicarnos con personal laico, pero se lo explicaré».
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

traits.locale_text: «¡Protocolo 12.45 guion 2!», {n} exclama Alva. Los ferracechadores cambian sutilmente de posición.{/n} «No hay mucho tiempo para comunicarnos con personal laico, pero se lo explicaré».

languages.text: “12.45-2协议！”{n}阿尔瓦厉声道，锈色追踪者随之微妙地变换阵型。{/n}“与教外人交流的时间有限，但我会进行说明。”
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

traits.locale_text: “12.45-2协议！”{n}阿尔瓦厉声道，锈色追踪者随之微妙地变换阵型。{/n}“与教外人交流的时间有限，但我会进行说明。”

languages.text: "Protokoll 12.45, Strich 2", {n} verkündet Alva, und die Rostpirscher verändern unmerklich ihre Haltung.{/n} "Für die Kommunikation mit Laien bleibt nicht viel Zeit, aber ich werde alles erklären."
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

traits.locale_text: "Protokoll 12.45, Strich 2", {n} verkündet Alva, und die Rostpirscher verändern unmerklich ihre Haltung.{/n} "Für die Kommunikation mit Laien bleibt nicht viel Zeit, aber ich werde alles erklären."

languages.text: "Protokol 12.45 tire 2!" {n} Alva'nın takırdaması üzerine Pasavcısı güruhu hafifçe pozisyon değiştiriyor.{/n} "Avamla iletişim kurmak için pek zaman yok ama açıklayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."

traits.locale_text: "Protokol 12.45 tire 2!" {n} Alva'nın takırdaması üzerine Pasavcısı güruhu hafifçe pozisyon değiştiriyor.{/n} "Avamla iletişim kurmak için pek zaman yok ama açıklayacağım."

languages.text: « Protocole 12.45 tiret 2 ! » {n}s'exclame Alva, et les corrôdeurs changent subtilement de position.{/n} « Je n'ai que peu de temps à accorder à des profanes, mais je vais vous expliquer. »
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.45 dash 2!" {n}rattles out Alva, and the Ruststalkers subtly change position.{/n} "There is little time for communicating with laypersons, but I will explain."
